findings.description: The candidate rule merges three highly distinct tonal dimensions ('Confident, not boastful', 'Warm, not overly emotional', and 'Clear, not complicated') into a single monolithic voice rule. This dilutes the specificity of each guideline and makes targeted adherence tracking difficult.

split_rules.description: State first-of-its-kind significance clearly and directly without overstating or sensationalizing claims.
Show genuine empathy about DM's daily impact, keeping patients at the center without being overly emotional.
Use plain, respectful language that is easy to understand without sacrificing medical accuracy.
